chunks.title: Hezekiah Sends to Isaiah
chunks.reason: Narrative of Hezekiah's reaction and the messengers' arrival with their plea.

chunks.title: Rabshakeh's Second Message
chunks.reason: Narrative shift to Assyria and the delivery of a taunting letter.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Prayer
chunks.reason: Hezekiah spreads the letter before God and offers a specific prayer for deliverance.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Assyria
chunks.reason: Isaiah delivers God's judgment and promise of defense against the king of Assyria.

chunks.title: Fall of the Assyrian Army
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion describing the angel's strike and Sennacherib's death.
